validators.proves: No local-path-shaped strings, raw provider payload marker, or provider credential env-name marker were found in the Phase 0 paths checked.
validators.gaps: Search is pattern-based and scoped to Phase 0 touched paths.

validators.proves: P0-T6 extraction checklist maps frozen SDK files to new runtime targets with line ranges, adaptation notes, and test migration paths.

validators.proves: Phase 0 requirements were checked item by item against current PR evidence, with remaining reviewer gates explicitly separated from local dev evidence.

deferred: Pull request creation and per-task reviewer workflow.
Phase 1-6 integration, browser, eval CLI, and real provider evidence.
review_focus: P5 public boundary hygiene: no public cwd, local paths, env names, raw provider payloads, or native IDs.
P7/P8 SDK remains adapter-only; no arbitrary MCP/custom tool/Bash surface.
P0 path discipline: no new business logic in src/sdk/agent-runtime/, backend/, or docs/superpowers/.
Threshold schema count and Phase 0/P6 split are intentional and aligned with plan dependency order.
